breakout_products.title: MaxHermes by Minimax
breakout_products.content: AI agent that builds skills from every task you give it. MaxHermes is a cloud sandbox AI agent that autonomously extracts reusable skills from completed tasks and improves itself across sessions. For knowledge workers and enterprise teams who want an AI assistant that compounds with use. Product categories: Automation tools, AI Workflow Automation.
breakout_products.selection_reason: Self-improving AI agent that extracts and compounds reusable skills across sessions.
breakout_products.summary: MaxHermes is a cloud sandbox AI agent designed for knowledge workers that learns and compounds its capabilities by extracting reusable skills from completed tasks.
breakout_products.display_title: Cloud-Based AI Agent Autonomously Extracts Reusable Skills to Improve Across Sessions
key_points: Operates within a cloud sandbox environment to safely execute and learn from user tasks.
Autonomously extracts reusable skills from completed workflows to improve future performance.
Targets enterprise teams and knowledge workers seeking an assistant that compounds in value over time.

breakout_products.title: WUPHF by Nex.ai
breakout_products.content: AI employees who build their own knowledge base. WUPHF is a collaborative office of AI employees who build and maintain their own knowledge base to never lose context for the tasks you give them. Supports Claude Code, Codex, OpenClaw agents and local LLMs via OpenCode. Chat with your agents via TUI, Web or Telegram. Open source. Runs on your machine, with your keys. Product categories: AI Workflow Automation, OpenClaw.
breakout_products.selection_reason: Open-source AI employee office that builds its own knowledge base across multiple interfaces.
breakout_products.summary: WUPHF provides a collaborative, open-source environment where AI agents build and maintain their own knowledge bases to retain context across tasks.
breakout_products.display_title: Open-Source AI Employee Platform Builds Autonomous Knowledge Bases for Context Retention
key_points: Supports multiple agent frameworks including Claude Code, Codex, OpenClaw, and local LLMs.
Allows users to interact with their AI agents through TUI, Web interfaces, or Telegram.
Runs entirely locally on the user's machine using their own API keys for enhanced privacy.

breakout_products.title: Moving from one platform to another usually means months of migration work. Base44 just made it a...
breakout_products.content: Moving from one platform to another usually means months of migration work. Base44 just made it a single click. breakout_products.title: Clera
breakout_products.content: An AI agent matching candidates to the right roles. Meet Clera: your AI talent agent for finding roles you actually want. Clera gets to know what you’re looking for over iMessage and WhatsApp. It surfaces roles you’d actually be excited by and makes direct intros to relevant companies. You hear about good opportunities without spending hours searching and applying. Product categories: Job boards, Hiring software, AI Agents.
breakout_products.selection_reason: AI talent agent using iMessage/WhatsApp for proactive job matching and introductions.
breakout_products.summary: Clera acts as a messaging-native AI talent agent that learns a candidate's preferences and proactively surfaces relevant roles with direct company introductions.
breakout_products.display_title: Clera Turns iMessage and WhatsApp Into an AI Talent Agent for Job Discovery
key_points: Candidates can describe their target roles through familiar chat apps instead of repeatedly searching job boards.
The agent filters opportunities based on individual preferences, reducing low-signal job discovery work.
Clera also makes direct introductions to relevant companies, moving beyond simple job listing recommendations.

breakout_products.title: OrcaSheets AI Reports
breakout_products.content: Query data to build dashboards and generate detailed reports. OrcaSheets is local-first analytics that runs on your laptop, letting you ask questions in plain English and get instant answers from unlimited data. Automate repetitive work, connect your databases, and eliminate cloud bills–all in a lightweight tool that keeps your data yours. Product categories: Business intelligence software.
breakout_products.selection_reason: Local-first AI analytics tool for natural language data querying and reporting.
breakout_products.summary: OrcaSheets provides a local-first business intelligence solution that allows users to generate dashboards and reports by querying unlimited data in plain English directly from their laptops.
breakout_products.display_title: Local-First Analytics Tool OrcaSheets Enables Plain English Data Queries Without Cloud Costs
key_points: Users can connect their databases and ask questions in natural language to instantly generate detailed reports and dashboards.
The software operates entirely locally on the user's machine, ensuring complete data privacy and eliminating external data transfers.
By removing the need for cloud processing, this lightweight tool helps businesses automate repetitive analytics tasks while avoiding recurring cloud infrastruc….

breakout_products.title: SureThing.io
breakout_products.content: Autonomous agent that communicates results like a human. Everyone's running AI agents. Seldom hitting their business goals. AI isn't the bottleneck anymore. Humans are. SureThing is a General AI Agency. Paste any GitHub skill — it becomes a team you can @ anytime. One persistent memory across your COO, CMO, and CTO — zero silos. Agents that report up like humans. So you can finally run it like a CEO, not a debugger. With SureThing, now hit your business goals at inference speed. Product categories: AI Workflow Automation.
breakout_products.selection_reason: Autonomous agent agency that converts GitHub skills into persistent, collaborative AI teams.
breakout_products.summary: SureThing operates as a general AI agency that converts GitHub skills into persistent, cross-functional virtual teams capable of reporting results like human employees.
breakout_products.display_title: Autonomous AI Agency Platform Transforms GitHub Skills Into Collaborative Virtual Executive Teams
key_points: Users can paste any GitHub skill to instantly generate a specialized virtual team member.
The platform maintains a single persistent memory across virtual executive roles to eliminate information silos.
Agents are designed to report progress and results in a human-like manner to streamline management.

hot_news.content: 智能终端工具Warp 宣布开源 并引入"AI 智能体驱动"的全新协作开发模式 开源后启用新协作方式：Warp 的云端 AI（叫 Oz）负责写代码、测试、规划等繁重工作，你只需要 review即可 OpenAI 是首位赞助商，开源仓库的 agent 工作流由 GPT 模型驱动（含 GPT-5.5） 同步推出三大产品改进“ 1、支持更多开源 AI 模型，包括 Kimi、MiniMax、通义千问（Qwen），还有"自动选最优开源模型"功能 2、界面和功能高度可定制：可以只用纯终端，也可以开启完整的 AI 开发环境 3、终于推出了配置文件（Settings File），方便跨设备迁移和程序化控制

llm.title: Every major "AI memory" product I've tested is storing text and calling it memory. Engramme's Lar...

llm.title: Earlier this month, an Erdős problem that had been open for 60 years was solved with help from GP...

OpenAI researchers @SebastienBubeck and @ErnestRyu join host @AndrewMayne to explain what changed and what it could mean for the future of research.

key_points: GPT-5.4 Pro actively contributed to solving a long-standing Erdős mathematical problem.

llm.title: GPT-5.5 Cites Brand Sites 47% of the Time. GPT-5.4 Did 57%. The Citation Data No One’s Talking About.
llm.content: GPT-5.5 cites brand websites 47% of the time, down from GPT-5.4's 57%. The mechanism: site: operator usage collapsed from 40.5% of searches to 12.6%. Here's what changed for AEO. The post GPT-5.5 Cites Brand Sites 47% of the Time. GPT-5.4 Did 57%. The Citation Data No One&#821...
llm.selection_reason: Significant data on GPT-5.5 citation behavior changes affecting AI Engine Optimization.

llm.display_title: Study Reveals Significant Drop in Brand Website Citations Between GPT-5.4 and GPT-5.5 Models
key_points: Brand website citations dropped by ten percentage points in the transition from GPT-5.4 to GPT-5.5.
The use of the site operator in searches plummeted from 40.5 percent to 12.6 percent.
These underlying search mechanism changes significantly impact Artificial Engine Optimization strategies for brands.

llm.title: Adaptive Thinking: Large Language Models Know When to Think in Latent Space

Models can adaptively determine when to utilize latent space thinking before generating final answers.
Increasing the thinking budget correlates with smooth performance improvements during inference.
